results.title: Review | The Theatre Group at Santa Barbara City College’s ‘Anything Goes’ Pairs Well with the Season
results.description: ‘Anything Goes’ is a breezy summer cocktail with a happily-ever-after chaser. The post Review | The Theatre Group at Santa Barbara City College’s ‘Anything Goes’ Pairs Well with the Season appeared first on The Santa Barbara Independent .
